reviews.comment:
La atención combustible muy bueno y tomar el desayuno o merienda las medialunas y tostados incomparable los extraño los domingos que que esta cerrado..

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent, the fuel was great, and having breakfast or an afternoon snack—the croissants and toast—was incomparable. I miss them on Sundays when they're closed.

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion, aunque hay vec3s que no finciona la APP YPF el dia de los descuentos. Baños limpios. El kiosco variado en productos, pero bastante caro. Recomendable!!

(Translated by Google)
Good service, although sometimes the YPF app doesn't work on discount days. Clean restrooms. The kiosk has a good selection of products, but it's quite expensive. Recommended!
